checks.name: unicode_nfc_nfd_distinct
checks.detail: No Unicode normalization is performed by SR-CANON-1-D01.

checks.name: duplicate_json_keys_rejected
checks.detail: Strict import parsing rejects duplicate decoded object keys.

checks.name: trailing_json_data_rejected
checks.detail: Strict import parsing rejects trailing data.

checks.name: zero_amount_exact
checks.detail: Zero is represented exactly under the current two-decimal profile.

checks.name: negative_amount_exact
checks.detail: Negative exact amounts remain exact where the bounded parser accepts them.

checks.name: excess_decimal_rejected
checks.detail: More than two decimal places are rejected by the active money profile.

checks.name: extreme_magnitude_exact
checks.detail: Large supported decimal magnitudes remain exact through BigInt minor units.

checks.name: jpy_explicitly_unsupported
checks.detail: Zero-decimal currency is not silently forced into the two-decimal profile.

checks.name: kwd_explicitly_unsupported
checks.detail: Three-decimal currency is not silently forced into the two-decimal profile.

checks.name: missing_as_of_abstains
checks.detail: Time-relative purposes abstain when the declared evaluation context is missing.

checks.name: duplicate_lineage_event_rejected
checks.detail: Exact event replay creates a lineage conflict rather than being counted twice.

checks.name: empty_item_lines_incomplete
checks.detail: An empty purchase does not resolve as a complete purchase declaration.

checks.name: invalid_item_quantity_rejected
checks.detail: Imported item quantities must be positive integers before entering the active receipt state.
